title: Aspect Alchemy
description:
Brew unique potions by combining alchemical aspects of Minecraft items!
Aspect Alchemy adds a deep, customizable potion-making system using an Aspect Cauldron. Combine ingredients based on their hidden "aspects" to create powerful elixirs
body:
![Aspect Alchemy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/472ea9f22726308b18203d41b6ac4c995913ee5c.png) ![Sub logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8bab0d4a1dbf779580b58ef7d3ca882be4f12e5.png) Aspect Alchemy adds a deep, customizable potion-making system using a special **Aspect Cauldron**. Combine ingredients based on their hidden "aspects" (status effects) to create powerful elixirs — then collect them in bottles of different sizes, infuse arrows, or just *bathe* in the brew directly.
--- ![banner2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac272eaf46a3330994c87ef419c6829e980c3e9c_0.webp)

### Every ingredient has hidden aspects which can be discovered through experimentation.

---
### Blocks - **Aspect Cauldron** — the main block of the mod. Holds up to 3 water levels (just like vanilla), tracks a `boiling` state, and stores up to 3 ingredients. Breaking it drops an empty cauldron. - **Aspect Empty Cauldron** — the base form; fill it with water to get started. ### Heating & Boiling Place the cauldron over a **Campfire, Fire, Soul Fire, Lava, or Magma Block** to heat it up. Heating takes **10 seconds (200 ticks)**. Remove the heat source and the cauldron cools down instantly. - While boiling, the cauldron emits **bubble particles** and plays ambient lava sounds. - ⚠️ Entities standing inside a boiling cauldron take **1 damage per second** unless fire-immune. ### Adding Ingredients Add up to **3 unique ingredients** by right-clicking with them in hand or throwing them in with **Q**. Duplicate ingredient types are not accepted. Each ingredient carries a list of status effects (its *aspects*). The system works like this: - An effect must appear across **2 or more ingredients** to be included in the final potion. - **Amplifier** = number of occurrences minus 1, capped at level V. ### Living Water Visuals - Water color **dynamically changes** based on added ingredients — it shows the average blend of all active effects' colors. - Empty cauldron resets to classic vanilla blue. - Visual feedback lets you see the brew's composition at a glance.
---
Stand inside a cauldron with a brewed potion to absorb its effects — **1 second of exposure = 3 seconds of effects**, refreshed every tick. Great for a quick heal before exploration or combat without consuming a bottle. - Fire on the entity is extinguished while standing inside. - ⚠️ Instant Damage in the brew deals extraordinary damage.
--- ### Bottle Sizes & Multi-Use Bottles Each scoop of the cauldron **lowers the water level by 1**. At level 1, the cauldron empties and reverts to its empty form.

Vanilla Bottle: 1 sip

Small Bottle: 2 sips

Medium Bottle: 3 sips

Large Bottle: 4 sips
Multi-use bottles (**MultiUsePotionItem**) can be refilled from the cauldron — as long as the effects in the bottle match those in the cauldron and the bottle isn't already full. ### Dynamic Potion Names & Colors Potions get a **dynamically generated name** based on their strongest effect: `[Prefix] [Effect] [Roman Numeral]` - Prefix depends on whether the dominant effect is beneficial or harmful. - Color = average of all active effects' colors. - Potion names appear in **blue**; arrow names appear in **red**.
--- ### Tipping Arrows One water level = **32 tipped arrows**. Infuse them by: - Right-clicking with regular arrows in hand, or - Throwing them into a boiling cauldron with **Q** Arrows inherit the cauldron's effects, dynamic name (red text), and custom color. Usage count is stored in NBT.
---


1. Place the **Aspect Cauldron** over a heat source. 2. Fill it with water (spawns with 1 level by default). 3. Add up to **3 unique ingredients** (right-click or Q-throw). 4. Wait for it to boil — watch the water change color. 5. Scoop your potion with any bottle size, tip arrows, or jump in to bathe.

Effects must appear in **at least 2 ingredients** to make it into the final potion. Plan your combinations wisely.
--- Item Aspect Reference (Spoiler Warning)
Spoiler
Ingredient Aspects (Status Effects)
Rabbit's FootSpeed, Jump Boost, Mining Fatigue, Luck
Phantom MembraneSpeed, Slow Falling, Levitation
SugarSpeed, Absorption, Saturation
Blaze PowderSpeed, Strength, Fire Resistance, Glowing
Sweet BerriesSpeed, Hunger, Instant Damage
FeatherSlow Falling, Speed, Weakness
Ender PearlSpeed, Levitation, Weakness
RedstoneHaste, Strength, Night Vision, Instant Damage
GunpowderHaste, Strength, Hunger, Glowing, Instant Damage
Lapis LazuliHaste, Water Breathing, Hunger, Luck
QuartzHaste, Glowing, Weakness
Fermented Spider EyeJump Boost, Blindness, Nausea, Poison, Weakness
Ghast TearRegeneration, Fire Resistance, Health Boost, Levitation, Bad Omen
Golden AppleRegeneration, Absorption, Luck
Milk BucketSaturation, Regeneration, Weakness
Honey BottleInstant Health, Regeneration, Slowness
Turtle HelmetResistance, Water Breathing, Slowness, Mining Fatigue
ObsidianResistance, Slowness, Fire Resistance
DiamondResistance, Health Boost, Luck
Amethyst ShardResistance, Night Vision, Luck, Slowness
Clay BallSlowness, Resistance, Instant Health
BoneWeakness, Resistance
StringSlowness, Weakness, Invisibility
Glistering Melon SliceHealth Boost, Saturation, Slowness
Golden CarrotNight Vision, Saturation, Slowness
Magma CreamFire Resistance, Hunger, Instant Damage, Unluck, Slow Falling
Nether BrickFire Resistance, Strength, Wither
Spider EyeBlindness, Poison, Weakness
PufferfishWater Breathing, Nausea, Poison, Instant Damage
Rotten FleshHunger, Strength, Poison
Red MushroomPoison, Nausea, Strength
Brown MushroomInstant Health, Hunger, Weakness
Glowstone DustNight Vision, Nausea, Glowing, Weakness
Dragon's BreathAbsorption, Instant Damage, Levitation, Bad Omen
Chorus FruitLevitation, Nausea, Invisibility
EggLevitation, Weakness, Instant Health
Nether WartResistance, Fire Resistance, Poison, Unluck, Slowness
CoalStrength, Hunger, Instant Damage
Soul SandSlowness, Wither, Unluck, Invisibility
HoneycombInstant Health, Slowness, Absorption
Wither Rose ⭐Wither ×2, Instant Damage, Strength
Torchflower ⭐Regeneration ×2, Night Vision, Luck
Pitcher Plant ⭐Absorption ×2, Slowness, Poison, Water Breathing
Echo Shard ⭐Strength ×2, Speed, Wither
⭐ = Rare ingredient with a doubled aspect — guaranteed to appear in the potion even without a second matching ingredient.
--- ![Planned features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4489158c93bfe2f039e2dafde5c0ab8e185819af.png) * Alchemy Automation. * Integration with other mods. * Different Minecraft versions support. * Forge support. * Alembic Addon: Aspect Separation with different Aspect Solubility (Water / Oil / Alcohol). * Explosive Potion, Burning Potion (usable as fuel), Potion of Experience, Potion of Zombification. * Boiling, tanning, and infusing leather armor in potions for permanent status effects. --- **Bug Reporting** Please report issues on our [GitHub](https://github.com/NezerX/Aspect-Alchemy) Issues page with: - Minecraft and mod versions. - Mod list (if relevant). - Steps to reproduce and logs (via Pastebin). **Community and Support** Support: Nothing, at least for now ) **License:** MIT License. Feel free to use the code in your projects with attribution.
